name: item11_multiscale_recordings.csv
command: python3 cache_item11_multiscale.py --workers 16 --csv_dir 'data/raw/weargait-pd/PD PARTICIPANTS/CSV files' --out results/item11_multiscale.csv --out_recordings results/item11_multiscale_recordings.csv

source_artifacts.scope: all PD subjects with walking-task recordings

leakage_rationale: Per-recording companion cache emitted by the same deterministic signal-processing command as results/item11_multiscale.csv. The script computes fixed multi-scale Freeze Index, freeze-window, wavelet-entropy, and stride-variability features from each walking recording. UPDRS-III labels never enter the script; all constants are fixed before downstream modeling.

provenance_backfill.evidence: The existing clean subject-level manifest results/item11_multiscale.csv.manifest.json records the producing script, git SHA, command, creation time, and label-free leakage rationale. cache_item11_multiscale.py defines results/item11_multiscale_recordings.csv as the default --out_recordings value, and the recording-level file mtime 2026-04-30T20:05:19Z matches the same extraction run immediately before the subject-level file mtime 2026-04-30T20:05:22Z.
provenance_backfill.note: This sidecar covers only the recording-level companion artifact. It does not change any modeling result.
